BY NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 4, 2021 PLAINTIFF TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF LIMITED TO CITATION TO CASES (NO ARGUMENT) FACTUALLY AND LEGALLY SIMILAR TO THE CASE AT BAR AS IT PERTAINS TO THE BROKER RE: CONTRACT, AGENCY AND HABITABILITY/MAINTENANCE LIABILITY. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT PAUL HWANG, SKYBOX REALTY, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH FACTS (NOT CONCLUSIONS) THAT THE MOVING DEFENDANT WAS A PROPERTY MANAGER. SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF IS STRICKEN AS IT IS COMPRISED ENTIRELY OF AN ARGUMENT THAT WAS EXPRESSLY NOT ALLOWED BY THE COURT'S SEPTEMBER 24, 2021 MINUTE ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S RELIANCE ON THE CONTRACTUAL TERMS IDENTIFYING THE REAL ESTATE BROKER AS THE AGENT FOR THE LANDLORD FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT REAL ESTATE BROKER IS THE MANAGER IS UNSUPPORTED BY FACT OR LAW. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT PAUL HWANG, SKYBOX REALTY, INC. DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege in good faith facts (not conclusions) that the moving defendant was a property manager. Supplemental brief is stricken as it is comprised entirely of an argument that was expressly not allowed by the Court's September 24, 2021 minute order. Plaintiff's reliance on the contractual terms identifying the real estate broker as the agent for the landlord for the proposition that real estate broker is the manager is unsupported by fact or law.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Continued To Nov-10-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2021 Continued To Oct-08-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS PAUL HWANG AND SKYBOX REALTY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to October 8, 2021. By no later than October 4, 2021 Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief limited to citation to cases (no argument) factually and legally similar to the case at bar as it pertains to the broker re: contract, agency and habitability/maintenance liability.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS PAUL HWANG AND SKYBOX REALTY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
